title: Unified Synthetic+Real Results Tables & Complete Statistical Test Catalogue
summary: Demo notebook loading pre-computed unified evaluation results (8 methods across synthetic+real datasets). Demonstrates: (A) method progression table comparing 5 FIGS methods + 3 baselines, (B) Spearman recovery-accuracy correlation (rho=0.047, p=0.868), (C) signed-vs-unsigned Hedges' g analysis with CoI divergence, (D) complete catalogue of 28 statistical tests. Includes 4-panel visualization of accuracy comparisons, scatter plots, effect sizes, and significance overview. Data: mini_demo_data.json (42.8 KB) with all sections from the evaluation output.
